title: Command Execution
html:
🆕 Command Execution

{% hint style="info" %} This functionality is still in beta testing and was added in 2025

netexec rdp ip -u user -p password -x whoami

You can also add the flag --cmd-delay and --clipboard-delay to increase the time if the target is very slow:

{% hint style="warning" %} The use of -x option will disconnect the target user if connected (like a lock), not logoff therefore no work is lost and no application is closed.
